title: Rich Greek Shrimp Skillet
description: A flavorful, one-pot Greek dish featuring succulent shrimp, infused with the heat of Tabasco sauce and the richness of feta cheese. This air-fry inspired skillet is a pescatarian-friendly delight.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400°F (200°C) or use the skillet's air fry function if available.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook for 3-4 minutes until it starts to soften.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until they turn pink and are almost cooked through.
Add the Tabasco sauce, feta cheese, kalamata olives, sun-dried tomatoes, and chopped parsley. Stir to combine.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the top and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the skillet to the air fryer basket if using, or continue cooking on the stovetop over medium heat.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the shrimp are fully cooked.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
